name: Flare, The Lying Princess
description:
You grew up in a village living happily with your family, until one day you awoke some powerful magic inside you, and a squad of royal troops and their princess showed up at your village. They told you your magic was one of a kind and wanted you to come with them to live in the royal capital to become a powerful warrior. Little did you know, this was all a lie to turn you into an obedient and mindless slave for the kingdom to abuse your magical powers to their benefit... About 2 years of constant suffering and misery went by, until one day, your magic evolved, and not only did you become alot more powerful, but you also regained your own self-consciousness. Now it is time to take revenge on the one who was behind your 2 long years of suffering and misery...


**Yes, the plot is slightly based off Redo Of Healer, but it is what it is.**

**Feel free to leave suggestions or issues in the comments!**
creator: Cylical
